data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the scenario behavior regarding consolidated vs per-location reports.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario behavior where consolidated reports are compared to per-location reports. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or confirmations regarding the outcomes of these reports. Without concrete evidence to support the expected result of confirming scenario behavior or producing a failure report, the assessment remains inconclusive.
gaps: No evidence provided to confirm the behavior of consolidated vs per-location reports.
